title: 宝塚記念の後に・咲き誇る、青

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Ehehe... thanks, Big Brother.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Ehehe... thanks, Big Sister.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I could hear everyone's voices while I was running.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
You can do it! "Go, Rice, go!" Everyone was
urging me onward.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, this isn't right. I promised I would make
everyone smile...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: But I'm the one who can't stop smiling!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... I'm so glad that I got to run in the Takarazuka Kinen!
choice_data_list: Everyone else feels the same way.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...They do?

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Riiiice! Thank yooou!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: This was the best Takarazuka Kinen ever!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Wow! There are happy faces everywhere!
choice_data_list: They're all smiling because of you.
They're all smiling because of you.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Because of... me?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... there's no way. The blue rose brings
happiness, not misfortune, the way I do.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
It would take someone really special to make
everyone smile like—

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh! That means... I... did it...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I brought happiness to everyone!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Nnng... Waaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She bursts into tears, shoulders quivering, while
the audience warmly applauds her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: At night...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Inhale... exhale...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Heh, yeah. I can't just keep crying forever.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I have to smile at everyone while I'm up onstage,
after all.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
That way I can show them how thankful I am to
have their support.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: And that tonight, I'll bring them all happiness.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Is that too much?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Thank goodness! If you say so, then I'm sure it's
fine.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Thank goodness! If you say so, then I'm sure it's
fine.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Well then, I'm off! I have to go see everyone.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Thanks!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Rice Shower puts on her best winning
concert performance yet.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, a large picture of her graces the
front page of the newspaper.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And thus blooms on Yodo turf a beautiful blue
rose—a new star, Rice Shower.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next day...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: B-Big Brother! I want to run in the Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: B-Big Sister! I want to run in the Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Yes! You see, I heard...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Bourbon and McQueen are racing there!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: So I want to join too! It'll be the ultimate race!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Yay! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Yay! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Like the Takarazuka Kinen, the Arima Kinen is a
race in which only the most popular runners can
participate.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To think, she's now able to say she wants to
participate without worrying about the
requirements. Which means...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh? Did I get taller?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Then, what do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: T-tell me, Big Brother!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: T-tell me, Big Sister!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower spends the rest of the day following
me around, pestering me for an answer.
